title: resource_names
description: Single source of truth for all resource names used in an emulation run. Written by __main__.py (infra), read by both __main__.py and attack.py. Eliminates logical-vs-AWS-name mismatches permanently. Also consumed by the UI for attack path visualization.

resources.description: Static AWS/Azure/GCP resource names — fully resolved strings usable directly in SDK calls (boto3, azure-sdk, google-cloud). NO Pulumi logical names. NO account-ID templates. Keys are semantic identifiers; values are the exact name argument passed to the cloud SDK.

pulumi_export_keys.description: Map of semantic key -> Pulumi export key for values that are only known after 'pulumi up' (ARNs, bucket names embedding account-ID, instance IDs, etc.). attack.py reads these via infra.get(value).
